name: tracecase
description: Agent eval + replay harness. CI for AI agents: record runs, replay against prompt/model changes, catch regressions and unsafe tool calls.

scripts.cf:preview: NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation opennextjs-cloudflare build && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation opennextjs-cloudflare build && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
